title: ULTRAKILL-ish Netherite
description: Gives Netherite Armour a somewhat Ultrakill feel while staying vanilla
body:
# Ultrakill-ish Netherite
A simple resource pack that tweaks Netherite Armor to give it a somewhat ULTRAKILL feel while staying vanilla.

If you feature this in your video or other form of content, please provide a link to this resource pack in the description.

### I ONLY UPLOAD MY PROJECTS TO MODRINTH
Anything else is a DIRTY BOOTLEG and won't support the creator, no matter how [BJTIF] they may be.
